news.t: Fundsmith Launches Fundsmith Equity ETF (Ticker: ETFT)

holdings.infoBox: ETFT is an equity ETF with a total of 23 individual holdings. The top holdings are Texas Instruments stock at 10.73%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 8.77%, Alphabet at 5.79%, Waters at 5.72%, and The Sage Group at 5.31%.

overview.description: The fundsmith Equity ETF (ETFT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a narrow portfolio of US and international equity securities of any market capitalization. The fund seeks growth. ETFT was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by Fundsmith.

data.title: Fundsmith Launches Fundsmith Equity ETF (Ticker: ETFT)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fundsmith announces the launch of the Fundsmith Equity ETF. This new exchange-traded fund is listed on the New York Stock Exchange, ticker ETFT.
